coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 11:54 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 70%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 11:54 at 100-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 6:18 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 6:18. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23 minutes of work done. 39 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 43% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 27 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 30 minutes in. 100% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 43% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 43% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 42 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% complete. Rep 4/5. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% done. 1 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 4. 1 to go. 23 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 11:54 at 100%. Then 11min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 11:54 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 11min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 82% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 45min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 82% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
